chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No.S-425 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing / priority 1. For order on office objections No.1 to 7 a/w reply as at „A‟. 2. For hearing of CMA No.3654/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 02.06.2025 Mr. Tanveer Qabool, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Khan Khaskheli, AAG Sindh. DSP Legal-II Raza Main, CPO a/w SSP Musaddiq Amjad. ------------------------------- The petitioner through the instant petition has claimed the following reliefs: “It is respectfully prayed that this Honourable Court may kindly be pleased to issue appropriate writ / direction to the Respondents as under:- A. TO DECLARE the act of the Respondent No.6 to 9 is illegal and unlawful in the eyes of law. B. TO DIRECT the officials Respondents to discharge their duties in accordance with law. C. TO DIRECT the Respondent No.2 to 4 to conduct Inquiry against the police officials/respondent No.7 and 8 and punish them under the provision of law. D. TO RESTRAIN the Respondent No.6 to 9 not to harass the petitioner and his family members without due course of law.” On notices the police officials have filed their replies and denied the allegations leveled by the petitioner and stated that a FIR No.338/2020 under Sections 354/452/337-A(i)/504/34 PPC at PS Pakistan Bazar stands registered against the respondent No.6 Asif Raza and his brother. He did not pressurize the police officials and the private respondents. Be that as it may, the petitioner claims the protection which the official respondents are bound to provide to him under the law. The official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner as and when required and not to cause any sort of harassment against him at the instance of the private respondents.

Be that as it may, the petitioner claims the protection which the official respondents are bound to provide to him under the law. The official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner as and when required and not to cause any sort of harassment against him at the instance of the private respondents. Petition stands disposed of alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
